query:
SELECT external_id, contract_no, customer_name, section
FROM contracts
WHERE customer_name LIKE '%สุภาพม%' OR customer_name LIKE '%สำราญ%' OR contract_no LIKE '%AVA001-9257%'
LIMIT 10
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute 
SELECT external_id, contract_no, customer_name, section
FROM contracts
WHERE customer_name LIKE '%สุภาพม%' OR customer_name LIKE '%สำราญ%' OR contract_no LIKE '%AVA001-9257%'
LIMIT 10
